fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the project.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date for the entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number on the project ledger entry.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account to which the project ledger entry is posted.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the project ledger entry.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that was posted on the entry.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in the local currency, of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Total Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of the posted entry in local currency. If you update the project ledger costs for item ledger cost adjustments, this field will be adjusted to include the item cost adjustments.

fields.name: Unit Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Total Price (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price (in local currency) of the posted entry.

fields.name: Resource Group No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code that is assigned to the relevant resource group if the entry affects a resource.
You can see the available resource groups by choosing the field.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the relevant location code if an item is posted.

fields.name: Job Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting group that was used when the entry was posted. The value depends on the account type. For inventoriable items, the field contains the Inventory Posting Group. For other account types the field is blank.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Contains the customer price group code that is assigned to the entry.
This field is used when the Type is Item.
You can see the customer price groups that are available by choosing the field.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Amt. to Post to G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that will be posted to the general ledger.

fields.name: Amt. Posted to G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that has been posted to the general ledger.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the entry. There are two types of entries:

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Contains the name of the job journal batch, from which a job ledger entry was posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the transaction type. The transaction type is used in connection with INTRASTAT reporting. It is transferred to the job ledger entries from the job journal, the sales lines and the purchase lines.
To see the transaction types that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Contains the transport method. The transport method is used in connection with INTRASTAT reporting. It is transferred to the job ledger entries from the job journal, the sales lines, and the purchase lines.
To see the transport methods that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the country/region code. The country/region code is used in connection with INTRASTAT reporting. It is transferred to the job ledger entries from the job journal, the sales lines, and the purchase lines.
To see the countries/regions that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Entry/Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Contains the entry/exit point, which is used in connection with INTRASTAT reporting. The entry/exit point is transferred to the job ledger entries from the job journal, the sales lines, and the purchase lines.
To see the entry/exit points that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip:
Contains the date on the document that provided the basis for this entry.
The program copied the date from the Document Date field on the journal line.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the external document number.
The number is copied from the External Document No. field on the journal line.
You cannot change the document number because the entry has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the area code, which is used in connection with INTRASTAT reporting. The area code is transferred to the job ledger entries from the job journal, the sales lines, and the purchase lines.
To see the areas that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Contains the transaction specification, which is used in connection with INTRASTAT reporting. The transaction specification is transferred to the job ledger entries from the job journal, the sales lines, and the purchase lines.
To see the Transaction Specifications that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series to which this entry's document number belongs.
You cannot change the number series because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Additional-Currency Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Contains the total cost of the posted entry in the additional reporting currency. If you update the job ledger costs for item ledger cost adjustments, this field will be adjusted to include the item cost adjustments.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Total Price
fields.tooltip: Contains the total price of the posted entry in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Add.-Currency Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Contains the Line Amount (Total Price - Line Discount Amount) of the posted entry in the additional reporting currency.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Line Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value in the local currency of products on the entry.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost for the posted entry, in the currency specified for the project.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Total Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total price for the posted entry, in the currency specified for the project.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of products on the entry.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line discount amount for the posted entry, in the currency specified for the project.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Contains the line discount amount for the posted entry, in the local currency.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the currency code of the posted entry, which is the currency code for the Job.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the rate of exchange between the job currency and local currency at the time the entry was posted.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of the ledger entry. You can enter up to 50 characters and spaces.

fields.name: Ledger Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry type that the project ledger entry is linked to.

fields.name: Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number (Resource, Item or G/L) to which the project ledger entry is linked.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number if the project ledger entry Specifies an item usage that was posted with serial number tracking.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number if the project ledger entry Specifies an item usage that was posted with lot number tracking.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line discount percent of the posted entry.

fields.name: Line Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of planning line that was created when the entry was posted. If the field is empty, no planning lines were created for this entry.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Original Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost of the posted entry in local currency at the time the entry was posted. It does not include any item cost adjustments.

fields.name: Original Total Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of the posted entry in local currency at the time the entry was posted. It does not include any item cost adjustments.

fields.name: Original Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost for the posted entry at the time of posting, in the currency specified for the project. No item cost adjustments are included.

fields.name: Original Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost for the posted entry at the time of posting, in the currency specified for the project. No item cost adjustments are included.

fields.name: Original Total Cost (ACY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of the posted entry in the additional reporting currency at the time of posting. No item cost adjustments are included.

fields.name: Adjusted
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a project ledger entry has been modified or adjusted. The value in this field is inserted by the Adjust Cost - Item Entries batch job. The Adjusted check box is selected if applicable.

fields.name: DateTime Adjusted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time stamp of a project ledger entry adjustment or modification.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the bin code, which is copied to the job ledger entry from a job journal line or a purchase line.
To see the bin codes that are available, choose the field.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Contains the quantity per item unit of measure, which is copied to the job ledger entry from a job journal line, a sales line, or a purchase line.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Contains the posted quantity calculated as the base unit of measure.
